export { onGenerate, onManifest } from './generator'
export { generateRestClient } from './generate-rest-client'

content.content:
1	import type * as DMMF from '@prisma/dmmf'
2	
3	import { fieldToTS, generateEnumType, generateInterface, mapScalarToTS, toModelPath } from './template'
4	
5	/** Generate a complete typed REST client TypeScript file from DMMF. */
6	export function generateRestClient(dmmf: DMMF.Document): string {
7	  const sections: string[] = []
8	
9	  sections.push(generateHeader())
10	  sections.push(generateConfigTypes())
11	
12	  for (const enumDef of dmmf.datamodel.enums) {
13	    sections.push(generateEnumType(enumDef))
14	  }
15	
16	  for (const model of dmmf.datamodel.models) {
17	    sections.push(generateModelTypes(model))
18	  }
19	
20	  sections.push(generateClientClass(dmmf.datamodel.models))
21	  sections.push(generateFactory())
22	
23	  return sections.join('\n\n') + '\n'
24	}
25	
26	function generateHeader(): string {
27	  return [
28	    '// -------------------------------------------------------',
29	    '// This file was auto-generated by @prisma/generator-rest-client.',
30	    '// Do not edit manually.',
31	    '// -------------------------------------------------------',
32	  ].join('\n')
33	}
34	
35	function generateConfigTypes(): string {
36	  return [
37	    'export interface RestClientConfig {',
38	    '  baseUrl: string',
39	    '  headers?: Record<string, string>',
40	    '  fetchFn?: typeof fetch',
41	    '}',
42	  ].join('\n')
43	}
44	
45	function scalarFields(model: DMMF.Model): readonly DMMF.Field[] {
46	  return model.fields.filter((f) => f.kind !== 'object' && f.kind !== 'unsupported')
47	}
48	
49	function identifierFields(model: DMMF.Model): readonly DMMF.Field[] {
50	  if (model.primaryKey) {
51	    const pkFieldNames = new Set(model.primaryKey.fields)
52	    return model.fields.filter((f) => pkFieldNames.has(f.name))
53	  }
54	
55	  const idField = model.fields.find((f) => f.isId)
56	  if (idField) return [idField]
57	
58	  const uniqueField = model.fields.find((f) => f.isUnique)
59	  if (uniqueField) return [uniqueField]
60	
61	  return []
62	}
63	
64	function generateModelTypes(model: DMMF.Model): string {
65	  const scalars = scalarFields(model)
66	  const idFields = identifierFields(model)
67	
68	  const mainInterface = generateInterface(
69	    model.name,
70	    scalars.map((f) => ({ name: f.name, type: fieldToTS(f) })),
71	  )
72	
73	  const createFields = scalars
74	    .filter((f) => !f.isReadOnly && !f.isUpdatedAt)
75	    .map((f) => {
76	      const isAutoId = f.isId && f.hasDefaultValue
77	      const optional = isAutoId || f.hasDefaultValue
78	      const type = fieldToTS(f)
79	      return { name: optional ? `${f.name}?` : f.name, type }
80	    })
81	  const createInput = generateInterface(`${model.name}CreateInput`, createFields)
82	
83	  const updateFields = scalars
84	    .filter((f) => !f.isId && !f.isReadOnly && !f.isUpdatedAt)
85	    .map((f) => ({ name: `${f.name}?`, type: fieldToTS(f) }))
86	  const updateInput = generateInterface(`${model.name}UpdateInput`, updateFields)
87	
88	  const parts = [mainInterface, createInput, updateInput]
89	
90	  if (idFields.length > 0) {
91	    const whereFields = idFields.map((f) => ({ name: f.name, type: mapScalarToTS(f.type) }))
92	    parts.push(generateInterface(`${model.name}WhereUniqueInput`, whereFields))
93	  }
94	
95	  return parts.join('\n\n')
96	}
97	
98	function generateClientClass(models: readonly DMMF.Model[]): string {
99	  const lines: string[] = []
100	
101	  lines.push('export class PrismaRestClient {')
102	  lines.push('  #baseUrl: string')
103	  lines.push('  #headers: Record<string, string>')
104	  lines.push('  #fetch: typeof fetch')
105	  lines.push('')
106	  lines.push('  constructor(config: RestClientConfig) {')
107	  lines.push('    this.#baseUrl = config.baseUrl.replace(/\\/$/, \'\')')
108	  lines.push('    this.#headers = config.headers ?? {}')
109	  lines.push('    this.#fetch = config.fetchFn ?? fetch')
110	  lines.push('  }')
111	
112	  for (const model of models) {
113	    lines.push('')
114	    lines.push(generateModelAccessor(model))
115	  }
116	
117	  lines.push('}')
118	
119	  return lines.join('\n')
120	}
121	
122	function generateModelAccessor(model: DMMF.Model): string {
123	  const name = model.name
124	  const path = toModelPath(name)
125	  const idFields = identifierFields(model)
126	  const hasId = idFields.length > 0
127	
128	  const lines: string[] = []
129	  lines.push(`  get ${lowerFirst(name)}() {`)
130	  lines.push(`    const url = \`\${this.#baseUrl}/${path}\``)
131	  lines.push('    const headers = { ...this.#headers, \'Content-Type\': \'application/json\' }')
132	  lines.push('    const fetchFn = this.#fetch')
133	  lines.push('    return {')
134	
135	  // findMany
136	  lines.push(`      async findMany(params?: { skip?: number; take?: number }): Promise<${name}[]> {`)
137	  lines.push('        const query = new URLSearchParams()')
138	  lines.push('        if (params?.skip !== undefined) query.set(\'skip\', String(params.skip))')
139	  lines.push('        if (params?.take !== undefined) query.set(\'take\', String(params.take))')
140	  lines.push('        const qs = query.toString()')
141	  lines.push('        const res = await fetchFn(`${url}${qs ? `?${qs}` : \'\'}`, { headers })')
142	  lines.push('        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`GET ${url} failed: ${res.status}`)')
143	  lines.push('        return res.json()')
144	  lines.push('      },')
145	
146	  if (hasId) {
147	    const whereType = `${name}WhereUniqueInput`
148	    const idParam = buildIdPathExpression(idFields)
149	
150	    // findUnique
151	    lines.push(`      async findUnique(where: ${whereType}): Promise<${name} | null> {`)
152	    lines.push(`        const res = await fetchFn(\`\${url}/${idParam}\`, { headers })`)
153	    lines.push('        if (res.status === 404) return null')
154	    lines.push('        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`GET failed: ${res.status}`)')
155	    lines.push('        return res.json()')
156	    lines.push('      },')
157	
158	    // create
159	    lines.push(`      async create(data: ${name}CreateInput): Promise<${name}> {`)
160	    lines.push('        const res = await fetchFn(url, { method: \'POST\', headers, body: JSON.stringify(data) })')
161	    lines.push('        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`POST ${url} failed: ${res.status}`)')
162	    lines.push('        return res.json()')
163	    lines.push('      },')
164	
165	    // update
166	    lines.push(`      async update(where: ${whereType}, data: ${name}UpdateInput): Promise<${name}> {`)
167	    lines.push(`        const res = await fetchFn(\`\${url}/${idParam}\`, { method: 'PUT', headers, body: JSON.stringify(data) })`)
168	    lines.push('        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`PUT failed: ${res.status}`)')
169	    lines.push('        return res.json()')
170	    lines.push('      },')
171	
172	    // delete
173	    lines.push(`      async delete(where: ${whereType}): Promise<${name}> {`)
174	    lines.push(`        const res = await fetchFn(\`\${url}/${idParam}\`, { method: 'DELETE', headers })`)
175	    lines.push('        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`DELETE failed: ${res.status}`)')
176	    lines.push('        return res.json()')
177	    lines.push('      },')
178	  } else {
179	    // create only (no unique identifier available for other operations)
180	    lines.push(`      async create(data: ${name}CreateInput): Promise<${name}> {`)
181	    lines.push('        const res = await fetchFn(url, { method: \'POST\', headers, body: JSON.stringify(data) })')
182	    lines.push('        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`POST ${url} failed: ${res.status}`)')
183	    lines.push('        return res.json()')
184	    lines.push('      },')
185	  }
186	
187	  lines.push('    }')
188	  lines.push('  }')
189	
190	  return lines.join('\n')
191	}
192	
193	/**
194	 * Build a template literal expression for constructing a URL path from
195	 * identifier fields, e.g. `${where.id}` or `${where.tenantId}/${where.userId}`.
196	 */
197	function buildIdPathExpression(idFields: readonly DMMF.Field[]): string {
198	  return idFields.map((f) => `\${where.${f.name}}`).join('/')
199	}
200	
201	function lowerFirst(s: string): string {
202	  return s.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + s.slice(1)
203	}
204	
205	function generateFactory(): string {
206	  return [
207	    'export function createRestClient(config: RestClientConfig): PrismaRestClient {',
208	    '  return new PrismaRestClient(config)',
209	    '}',
210	  ].join('\n')
211	}
212

1	import type * as DMMF from '@prisma/dmmf'
2	
3	/**
4	 * Map a Prisma scalar type name to its TypeScript equivalent for REST transport.
5	 *
6	 * `DateTime`, `Decimal`, and `Bytes` become `string` because JSON serialization
7	 * over HTTP cannot preserve their native semantics (Date objects, arbitrary
8	 * precision, binary data).
9	 */
10	export function mapScalarToTS(prismaType: string): string {
11	  switch (prismaType) {
12	    case 'String':
13	      return 'string'
14	    case 'Boolean':
15	      return 'boolean'
16	    case 'Int':
17	    case 'Float':
18	      return 'number'
19	    case 'BigInt':
20	      return 'bigint'
21	    case 'Decimal':
22	      return 'string'
23	    case 'DateTime':
24	      return 'string'
25	    case 'Json':
26	      return 'unknown'
27	    case 'Bytes':
28	      return 'string'
29	    default:
30	      return prismaType
31	  }
32	}
33	
34	/** Convert a DMMF field to its TypeScript type string (e.g. `string | null`, `number[]`). */
35	export function fieldToTS(field: DMMF.Field): string {
36	  const base = mapScalarToTS(field.type)
37	  const typed = field.isList ? `${base}[]` : base
38	  return field.isRequired ? typed : `${typed} | null`
39	}
40	
41	/** Produce a `export type Role = 'ADMIN' | 'USER' | 'GUEST'` declaration. */
42	export function generateEnumType(enumDef: DMMF.DatamodelEnum): string {
43	  const values = enumDef.values.map((v) => `'${v.name}'`).join(' | ')
44	  return `export type ${enumDef.name} = ${values}`
45	}
46	
47	/** Produce an `export interface User { ... }` declaration for the given fields. */
48	export function generateInterface(name: string, fields: Array<{ name: string; type: string }>): string {
49	  const body = fields.map((f) => `  ${f.name}: ${f.type}`).join('\n')
50	  return `export interface ${name} {\n${body}\n}`
51	}
52	
53	/** Lowercase model name for use as a REST URL path segment. */
54	export function toModelPath(modelName: string): string {
55	  return modelName.toLowerCase()
56	}
57

content.text:
Everything looks correct. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## Implementation Complete

### Package: `packages/generator-rest-client/` — `@prisma/generator-rest-client`

**10 files created** (7 source + 3 config):

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `package.json` | Package manifest with `bin` field mapping `prisma-generator-rest-client` → `dist/bin.js`, depends on `@prisma/generator-helper` |
| `tsconfig.json` | IDE config extending root `tsconfig.json` |
| `tsconfig.build.json` | Build config extending `tsconfig.build.regular.json` |
| `helpers/build.ts` | esbuild config: uses `adapterConfig` for CJS+ESM library + custom bin target with `#!/usr/bin/env node` shebang |
| `src/bin.ts` | Executable entry point — calls `generatorHandler()` with `onManifest`/`onGenerate` |
| `src/index.ts` | Library exports for programmatic use |
| `src/generator.ts` | `onManifest()` returns manifest with `prettyName` + `defaultOutput`; `onGenerate()` calls the code generator and writes `rest-client.ts` to the output directory |
| `src/generate-rest-client.ts` | Core code generation — parses DMMF models/enums and outputs a complete TypeScript file with interfaces, CRUD methods, and a `PrismaRestClient` class |
| `src/template.ts` | Type mapping utilities (`mapScalarToTS`, `fieldToTS`), enum/interface generators, URL path helpers |
| `src/__tests__/generate-rest-client.test.ts` | **31 tests** covering all scalar type mappings, enum generation, interface generation, create/update/unique input derivation, relation field exclusion, composite `@@id` keys, `@unique` fallback, models without identifiers, list/nullable fields, multi-model generation, and factory function |

### Key Design Decisions

- **External generator pattern** using `generatorHandler()` from `@prisma/generator-helper` (JSON-RPC over stdio)
- **Fetch-based REST client** with configurable `baseUrl`, `headers`, and `fetchFn`
- **Smart identifier detection**: `@id` → `@@id` → `@unique` fallback chain for `WhereUniqueInput`
- **Graceful degradation**: models without any identifier skip `findUnique`/`update`/`delete` (only get `findMany` + `create`)
- **Clean type mappings**: `DateTime`/`Decimal`/`Bytes` → `string` for REST transport; `Json` → `unknown`; relation fields excluded from interfaces

### Test Results

✅ **31/31 tests passing**
